title: Microsoft’s new AI models & bots dominate the internet
summary: A Cloudflare study shows agentic AI bots generate 57.4% of web requests globally. The Mixture of Experts podcast panel debates whether this represents a fundamental shift in web interaction or a continuation of existing bot dominance patterns.
writeup: This Mixture of Experts episode from IBM Technology examines a Cloudflare study reporting that agentic AI bots account for 57.4% of web requests globally. The panel debates whether that figure marks a fundamental shift in how the web is accessed or simply continues longstanding patterns of bot-dominated traffic. The discussion frames the rise of AI agents as the central factor, with the open question being novelty versus continuity rather than a settled conclusion.
